Off Calendar Sep-22-2014 Vacated

Defendants' Motion For Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-02-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR WED., JUL-02-2014; J. JULIE HANSEN, ESQ. OF HASSARD BONNINGTON LLP FOR DEFENDANTS; THERE IS NO APPEARANCE BY OR FOR PLAINTIFF(S) FOR THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT THIS DAY. AFTER HEARING STATEMENTS PRESENTED BY COUNSEL HANSEN, THE COURT THEN GRANTS THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND SIGNS BOTH THE ORDER GRANTING MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND THE JUDGMENT FOLLOWING ORDER GRANTING MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IN OPEN COURT.

JUDGE: HON. RICHARD B. ULMER, JR.; CLERK MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (D-624).

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication, By Defendants The Regents Of The University Of California, Patricia Robertson, M.D., Andrea Jackson, M.D., And Russell Laros, M.D.
Off Calendar Jun-30-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling re: DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA, PATRICIA ROBERTSON, M.D., ANDREA JACKSON, M.D., RUSSELL LAROS JR., M.D.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication.

Per order of the presiding judge, the matter is transferred to be heard on July 2, 2014, at 9:30 a.m. in department 624 before Judge Ulmer because of the CCP 170.6 challenge. The court will not provide a court reporter for this hearing. If any party wishes a reporter, the parties must meet and confer and agree on a single reporter. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
